greeting: Hey! 👋 I'm the FireOrder bot. Ask me about hours, delivery, payment, or how ordering works — or type "human" anytime to reach a real person.
fallback: I'm not sure about that one — I'll flag this for a real person to answer. Hang tight, someone will reply right here soon.

faqs.answer: We're taking orders daily from 11am to 10pm. Orders sent after close will be picked up first thing the next day.
Delivery usually takes 30–60 minutes depending on how busy we are — we'll text you with updates after you send your order.
We accept Cash App, Apple Pay, PayPal, and Zelle. After you submit your order you'll get the exact handle to send payment to.
Screenshot your order from wherever you're getting food, fill in your name/phone/address on our form, pick a payment method, and send it. We'll text you to confirm.
Check the homepage for today's 3 featured restaurants, or visit our Menu page for the full shared menu of items we deliver.
If you need to cancel or get a refund, let us know here with your order number and we'll take care of it personally.
Got it — flagging this conversation for a real person. Someone from our team will reply right here as soon as they're free.
